touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach email to Ravi Thomas introducing AskElephant's forecasting accuracy capabilities. Rep highlighted pain points around pipeline visibility and compared differentiation vs Chorus. Ravi responded positively, open to learning more.

14-minute qualification call with Ravi Thomas. Discussed current forecasting challenges at HelixFlow and team size. Ravi confirmed they're evaluating solutions including Chorus. Rep qualified budget range and decision timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a forecasting solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CS team needs better visibility into customer health trends, current tools aren't giving us predictive insights

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We're typically competitive on price and offer more flexible automation tiers

next_steps: Share one-pager on forecasting use case

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute discovery call with Ravi. Rep explored current forecasting workflow, pain points with manual data aggregation, and team structure. Ravi described CS team's quarterly review process and expressed interest in automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current forecasting process today
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual - pulling data from multiple sources, lots of spreadsheet work, takes days to compile

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing Salesforce setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration with real-time sync

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Rachel Baker from sales ops will want to see the technical side, and Chris Carter handles procurement

objections: Need to understand total cost of ownership including implementation
next_steps: Schedule deeper discovery on technical requirements
Intro to Rachel for technical evaluation

touches.ai_summary: 35-minute extended discovery session with Ravi. Deep dive into HelixFlow's data sources, reporting cadence, and success metrics. Discussed unlimited automation tier benefits for their use case. Ravi mentioned Chorus demo scheduled next week.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like 6 months after implementing this?
questions_asked.answer: Cut forecasting cycle time by 50%, better accuracy on customer churn predictions

questions_asked.question: What's included in the unlimited automation tier vs standard?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automated workflows, custom triggers, and advanced ML model access vs basic automation

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Need to have something in place by end of quarter, so next 4-6 weeks

questions_asked.question: How are other CS teams using this for forecasting?
questions_asked.answer: Shared case study on churn prediction and expansion forecasting with similar-sized teams

objections: Chorus has more brand recognition in the market
Concerned about learning curve for the team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email recapping discovery findings and confirming technical eval logistics. Shared documentation on unlimited automation tier and integration architecture. Ravi confirmed Rachel's availability for technical deep dive.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over the security questionnaire ahead of Rachel's call?
questions_asked.answer: Attached SOC2 report and standard security documentation

touches.ai_summary: 40-minute technical evaluation call with Rachel Baker. Rep walked through platform architecture, API capabilities, and data security. Rachel tested integration workflows and asked detailed questions about automation limits and customization. Some concerns raised about implementation timeline and internal resource requirements.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 4-6 weeks including data migration and user training

questions_asked.question: What's your current tech stack for customer data?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, Zendesk, and some custom internal tools

questions_asked.question: How much engineering support will we need on our side?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal - mostly configuration work, but you'll want a technical point person for first two weeks

questions_asked.question: What happens if we exceed the 14 seats later?
questions_asked.answer: Flexible to add seats mid-contract at prorated pricing

objections: Implementation timeline is tight given our Q2 deadlines
Need to confirm we have internal resources to support onboarding
next_steps: Intro to Chris for procurement discussion

touches.ai_summary: 10-minute negotiation call with Ravi. Discussed initial pricing proposal for 14 seats with unlimited automation tier. Ravi mentioned budget constraints and asked about discount options. Rep noted willingness to work on pricing with longer commitment.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the annual price if we commit to multi-year?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can discuss volume discounts for 2-3 year agreements

objections: Proposed price is above our initial budget allocation
next_steps: Rep to prepare revised pricing scenarios
Loop in Chris on procurement requirements

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute negotiation call with Ravi to review revised pricing options. Rep presented three tiers with varying discount levels. Ravi pushed for deeper discount citing Chorus competitive offer. Discussion around contract length, payment terms, and feature commitments. No exec sponsor mentioned despite deal size.

questions_asked.question: Chorus is offering us a 30% discount - can you match that?
questions_asked.answer: We can get close with a 23% discount on annual commitment, but need faster decision timeline

questions_asked.question: Who on the executive team is aware of this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: This is being driven by our department, we have budget authority at this level

questions_asked.question: What's the cancellation policy if it doesn't work out?
questions_asked.answer: Standard annual contract, but we can discuss early termination clauses

objections: Still higher than Chorus offer even with discount
CFO may want to review any deal over $10k
next_steps: Finalize pricing at $11,800 ACV with 23.6% discount
Schedule final pricing call with Chris

touches.ai_summary: 6-minute pricing confirmation call with Ravi. Reviewed final pricing terms at $11,800 ACV for 14 seats, unlimited automation tier. Ravi verbally agreed to terms and confirmed Chris will handle contract paperwork. Rep noted urgency to close before quarter end.

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on moving forward with these terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this works for us. Let's get the contract over to Chris

next_steps: Process order by end of week
